response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals across diverse domains, they lack the mandatory technical requirements. With only ~1 year of C++ experience across a 20-year career (vs. required 5–10 years), no documented Windows platform focus, and no SQL Server/Oracle expertise, they are fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. Their sole finance exposure was in a JavaScript/TypeScript stack, not capital markets systems development.
strengths: 20 years of progressive software development experience with demonstrated ability to master new domains and technologies
One financial services background at RIDE Capital with exposure to investment practices and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Strong communication and mentorship skills evidenced by workshops, public talks, and active open-source contributions
concerns: Critical skill gap: only ~1 year of C++ experience across entire career vs. mandatory 5–10 years requirement
No documented Windows platform specialization; career primarily web/systems-focused (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience specified; only MySQL and MongoDB mentioned; finance role used GraphQL/web stack, not database-intensive capital markets systems
